name: operations manager in a logistics company tracking productivity metrics for 50-100 employees tool
description: For operations managers in a logistics company processing 50-100 employees, poor attendance tracking causes high turnover rates. We provide a workforce analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: operations manager in a logistics company tracking productivity metrics for 50-100 employees
problem_solved: Inability to effectively monitor employee productivity and attendance.
